input.command: git diff HEAD -- app/src/renderer/src/api.ts app/src/renderer/src/screens/Repos.tsx app/src/renderer/src/screens/SessionDetail.tsx src/server.ts prisma/schema.prisma
input.description: Show full diff of changed files

content.text: Let me check the relevant API and server code to understand the full picture.

Here's where things stand on branch `ParsingEntireLog`:

**Uncommitted changes:**
- `src/server.ts` — added `/api/branches` endpoint (lists local git branches for a repo)
- `app/src/renderer/src/api.ts` — added `fetchBranches()`
- `app/src/renderer/src/screens/Repos.tsx` — added `RepoBranchCell`: branch dropdown in the repos table that navigates to `/branch-log`
- `app/src/renderer/src/screens/SessionDetail.tsx` — added `hasRedactedThinking` support (shows "thinking (redacted)" label when thinking is redacted)
- `prisma/schema.prisma` — added `(sessionId, timestamp)` and `(sessionId, id)` indexes on `LogEvent`

The `/api/branch-log` endpoint and `BranchLog` screen already exist and parse `Entire-Checkpoint: <id>` trailers from git commit messages.

What would you like to continue working on?
